prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约33361→33069→123430（2023年断档异常）→101439→101526。2023年出现大幅断档后，2024年迅速回升至约10.1万名，2025年基本持 平于10.15万名，近两年位次趋于稳定，2025年基准约101526名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划持续扩招：2021年78人、2022年82人、2023年83人、2024年88人 、2025年92人；2026年计划97人，较2025年增加5人，扩幅约5.4%，招生名额增加使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学主榜排名约第120名（2026年），近年排名在116–122名之间波动，属于中后段211院校；该校在声誉文件中未单独列出，整体声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第95/ 106（评价为“一般”），短视频平台曝光量较低；未见明显投档断档或负面舆情记录；第五轮学科评估中，食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科， 与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高 ，而农林类、动物生产类等传统专业热度平稳；河北省2026年高考总报名约60.98万人，物理类按近年占比约59.7%估算约36.4万人，较2025年（36.3万）略有增加，整体竞争环境 趋紧；2026年；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，属东北地区，对河北省考生而言地域偏好一般；该校全国招生约5575人（2025年）， 河北省招生约110人（含各科类），占比约1.97%，非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次101526名、2026年扩招约5.4%、河北省 物理类考生略增、学校声誉平稳但地域热度一般等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约104637名，区间104137–105137名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 33361 → 33069 → 123430 (abnormal gap in 2023) → 101439 → 101526. After a significant gap in 2023, it quickly recovered to about 101,000 in 2024, and remained stable at about 101,500 in 2025. The rankings have stabilized in recent two years, with a baseline of about 101526 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province has been continuously expanding: 78 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 83 in 2023, 88 in 2024, 92 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 97, an increase of 5 from 2025, about 5.4% expansion, making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks about 120th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), fluctuating between 116–122 in recent years, belonging to the mid-to-late segment of 211 universities. The university is not listed separately in reputation documents, with overall reputation stable; Douyin popularity ranks 95/106 (rated as 'average'), with low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious admission gaps or negative public opinion records are observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in enrollment majors, attracting some interest for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity, while traditional majors like Agriculture and Forestry and Animal Production remain stable. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Hebei Province is about 609,800, with Physics Category estimated at about 364,000 based on the recent proportion of about 59.7%, slightly higher than 2025 (363,000), making the overall competition environment tighter. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, with average regional preference for Hebei examinees. The university enrolls about 5,575 students nationwide (2025), with about 110 in Hebei (including all categories), accounting for about 1.97%, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 101526, an enrollment expansion of about 5.4% in 2026, a slight increase in Physics Category examinees in Hebei, stable university reputation but average regional popularity, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 104637, with a range of 104137–105137.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Agricultural Mechanization and Automation (Top Talent Training Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 104137–105137, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 104000), you can focus on competitive majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (outside 105000), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university has distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, with Food Science and Engineering being an A- advantage discipline, worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3520 → 3525 → 4056 → 9549 → 9855. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 3520, slightly shifted back to 4056 in 2023, jumped significantly to 9549 in 2024, and continued to shift back to 9855 in 2025, with a cumulative shift of about 5800 positions over the past two years, showing a clear backward trend. The 2025 baseline is approximately 9855. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei: 8 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 18 in 2025; 16 in 2026, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a reduction of about 11.1%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 120th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science (2026), belonging to the middle-to-lower tier of 211 institutions. Its reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 95/106 (rated as 'average'), with relatively low exposure. There are no records of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Food Science and Engineering received an A-, which has no direct correspondence with History Category majors (Business Administration, Finance, Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management, Land Resource Management, and the Sino-US Credit Recognition Program in Business Administration), making the advantageous disciplines less attractive to History Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors like Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting/Finance/Auditing are either hot or in a wait-and-see state, while Business Administration is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hebei is estimated at about 245,000 based on a recent proportion of approximately 40.3%, a slight increase from 2025 (244,000). The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, which has average regional appeal for Hebei History Category applicants. The History Category majors include Business Administration (Sino-US 121 Dual Degree Program, with domestic tuition of 5,000 yuan/year plus foreign fees), and the higher tuition may reduce some applicants' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9855, the approximately 11.1% enrollment reduction in 2026, the recent continuous and significant backward trend in History Category rankings, a slight increase in total examinees but eased competition due to enrollment reduction, and the low correlation between advantageous disciplines and History Category majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9398, with a range of 8898–9898.

- Finance (including Finance, International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management
- Land Resource Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8898–9898, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9000), you can focus on Business Administration and Finance; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 9800), it is advisable to prioritize the Tier 3 Sino-foreign cooperative program to ensure admission. The university has few History Category majors, so applicants should note the limited choice of majors.
